caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, reacting to a video displayed on a screen embedded in the center of the image. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them is a television with the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" across the top, a soundbar, and a shelf filled with CDs. The embedded video shows scenes from a drama. In the first sequence, a figure in a dark cloak is seen from behind in a stone corridor, followed by a shot of a woman with long dark hair looking out over a city. The subtitles read "I want... Kharzacada." As the sequence progresses, the scene shifts to a dim room with several people standing, before focusing on a close-up of a woman's face. The final subtitle changes to "I accept his condition."
